name: Crystal Shark
name_jp: クリスタル・シャーク
desc: If this card is used for the Xyz Summon of a "Number" monster, it can be treated as a Level 3 or 4 monster. If this card is in your hand or GY: You can target 1 WATER monster on the field; Special Summon this card (but banish this card when it leaves the field), and if you do, halve that monster's ATK, also, you cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Xyz Monsters. You can only use this effect of "Crystal Shark" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is used for the Xyz Summon of a "Number" monster, it can be treated as a Level 3 or 4 monster. If this card is in your hand or GY: You can target 1 WATER monster on the field; Special Summon this card (but banish this card when it leaves the field), and if you do, halve that monster's ATK, also, you cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Xyz Monsters. You can only use this effect of "Crystal Shark" once per turn.
eff: If this card is used for the Xyz Summon of a "Number" monster, it can be treated as a Level 3 or 4 monster. If this card is in your hand or GY: You can target 1 WATER monster on the field; Special Summon this card (but banish this card when it leaves the field), and if you do, halve that monster's ATK, also, you cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Xyz Monsters. You can only use this effect of "Crystal Shark" once per turn.

sets.set: Legendary Duelists: Duels From the Deep

summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
